violations.text: The faucet for the hand-washing sink in the ware washing area was observed to be leaking when the hot water supply is turned on. The plumbing system and fixtures shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

Per PIC, the dishwashing is unable to reach the proper sanitization temperature and is not in good repair. PIC stated that they are waiting on a new booster to arrive and be installed. Establishment is currently sending dishes through dishwasher and then sanitizing in the 3-bay sink until machine is replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The faucet for the hand washing sink in the ware washing area was observed to be leaking when the hot water supply is turned on. The plumbing system and fixtures shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on the milk cooler were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on the milk cooler were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC shall provide ServSafe certificate for inspector. Licensed Food Safety Manager application was provided. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

Corn was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in (PIC moved corn to shelf during inspection) Boxes of food were observed on the floor in dry storage and in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

Violation of Code: 4-101.19 Nonfood-Contact Surfaces. NonFOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other FOOD soiling or that require frequent cleaning shall be constructed of a CORROSION-RESISTANT, nonabsorbent, and SMOOTH material. Walls in dish room were observed to be constructed of painted cinder block. Walls near and around 3 bay sink, hand sink and dish machine shall be constructed of a material that is non-absorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

4-101.19 Nonfood-Contact Surfaces. NonFOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other FOOD soiling or that require frequent cleaning shall be constructed of a CORROSION-RESISTANT, nonabsorbent, and SMOOTH material. Walls in dish room were observed to be constructed of painted cinder block. Walls near and around 3 bay sink, hand sink and dish machine shall be constructed of a material that is non-absorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
